title: 2 Pcs Compact Mirror for Handbag Pocket Mirror for Women Girls Men, Portable Folding Travel Makeup Mirrors, Double-Sided Make Up Magnifying Round Handheld Mirrors for Purse
features: Exquisite Material: Compact mirrors are made of high-quality material, with exquisite workmanship, high definition, not easy to be damaged, resistant to falling. Pocket mirror for women can be easily opened and closed, which is strong and durable.

Portable Design: The pocket mirror adopts a portable design, which is lightweight, compact and lightweight, easy to carry and will not burden you. The travel mirror can be carried in your handbag, pocket, wallet, luggage, or backpack for easy travel use.

Double-Sided Magnifying Mirror: One side of the compact mirror for handbag is a regular mirror, which can provide a clear and real image; the other side is a magnifying mirror, allowing you to see even small details clearly.

Wide Range of Applications: Suitable for going out, traveling, camping, business trips, shopping and other occasions. You can apply makeup or touch up makeup at any angle within 180 degrees, providing you with greater comfort.

Ideal Gift Choice: The portable handheld cosmetic mirror case features a quicksand design that is sparkling, creative and attractive. An ideal gift choice for mothers, daughters, sisters, wives, girlfriends, etc. on holidays such as Christmas, Thanksgiving, Halloween, and anniversaries.
